blocks.text: Match preview: Cyprus Women face Malta Women in 1st T20I (T20) on Thu, 18 Jun, 2026, 1:00 pm at Kennington Oval London. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Seam-friendly English conditions; overcast skies assist swing bowlers.
Drizzle · High 26°C / Low 17°C · Rain: 1.1 mm · Wind: up to 17 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
